import unreal
abp='/Game/Character/ABP_Bodycam'
unreal.load_asset(abp)
seq=None
for o in unreal.ObjectIterator():
    try:
        cls=o.get_class().get_name()
    except Exception:
        continue
    if cls=='AnimGraphNode_SequencePlayer' and ':AnimGraph.' in o.get_path_name() and 'ABP_Bodycam' in o.get_path_name() and '.Walk.' in o.get_path_name():
        seq=o
props = seq.get_editor_property('show_pin_for_properties')
for i in range(len(props)):
    s = props[i]
    if str(s.get_editor_property('property_name'))=='PlayRate':
        s.set_editor_property('show_pin', True)
        props[i] = s
seq.set_editor_property('show_pin_for_properties', props)
check = seq.get_editor_property('show_pin_for_properties')
print('persisted:', [(str(p.get_editor_property('property_name')), p.get_editor_property('show_pin')) for p in check if str(p.get_editor_property('property_name'))=='PlayRate'])
ok = unreal.BlueprintService.refresh_node(abp,'Walk','FD4B8E16402A37FCFBF0E1A744A5CE19')
pins = unreal.BlueprintService.get_node_pins(abp,'Walk','FD4B8E16402A37FCFBF0E1A744A5CE19')
print('refresh:', ok)
print('PINS NOW:', pins)
